title: Quantum Parameter Estimation: Precision Limits
description: Explore the fundamental limits of estimating continuous parameters encoded in quantum states. Learn about the Cramer-Rao bound, optimal estimators, and how quantum mechanics enables enhanced precision in metrology.
learningObjectives: Derive the classical and quantum Cramer-Rao bounds
Understand the role of the Fisher information in estimation theory
Implement maximum likelihood estimators for quantum parameters
Analyze the precision scaling in quantum metrology
Design optimal estimation protocols for phase estimation
